data.name: Monster City: A Monster College Story
data.detailed_description:
Features:

  • 2.000 Full Hd Images

  • 60 Full Hd Videos

  • 40.000 Words

  • Music & Sound effect

  • Moaning sfx

  • You Can Decide the Name Of the Character

  • Multiple Endings

  • Ren'py Engine

  • Optional Sand Box

    The Game:
    Are you ready to dive into a sexy, mysterious, and laughter-filled adventure?

Monster City: A Monster College Story is an adult visual novel that blends humor, the supernatural, and a touch of mischief.

Set in the same universe as Monster College, this spin-off puts you in the shoes of Adam Thorne, a young vampire… just a little different from the rest.

Growing up with countless struggles due to his defective powers (and a complicated family), Adam is determined to carve out his own path in life. Between Alchemy lessons and Vampirology classes, he’ll find himself entangled in a world of mysteries, dangers, and irresistible girls.

Unlike Monster College, this time you won’t be confined to Silverleaf University—the world expands to the nearby town of Silverwood, a seemingly ordinary place… but full of secrets and hidden monsters living among humans.

Meet the girls of Monster City!

🖤 Kassidy – Your alluring (and overwhelming) landlady. She’ll quickly realize there’s something unusual about you… but will you keep her at a distance or weave her into your web?

💪 Noksan – A strong, imposing orc with a tender heart and a sensitive soul. An outsider among her kind, and a surprise for you. Will you fall for her sweetness or her statuesque body?

❄️ Fuyu – A lively and energetic yuki-onna, in Silverleaf as part of a Japanese exchange program. The language barrier might be a challenge… but with the right approach, you’ll get through to her!

👁️ Lyra – An invisible girl who feels more like a shadow than a person. She avoids the world… but maybe you’re the one who can truly ‘see’ her.

🩸 Beatrix – A sassy ghoul with a weakness for bad habits. Behind her cocky smile, there’s more than meets the eye.

🔥 Elissa – A stunning dragoness, arrogant and self-assured, ruling over Silverleaf like a true queen bee. But behind her proud demeanor and massive ego lies a scandalous secret.

🛠️ Valeria – A nerd with an undying passion for movies, books, and video games. This dullahan always has a wild project in mind and needs someone to lend a hand… with the right reward, of course.

🌙 Maya – A mysterious figure who bursts into your life without warning. Fate has tied her to you… but whether that’s a blessing or a curse is up to you to decide.

And these are just some of the faces you’ll meet! Old friends (and rivals) from Monster College will return, including the cheeky mummy Oliver and the captivating vampire Dragomira.

Key Features
✨ An engaging story packed with humor – Sexy moments, mysteries to unravel, and hilarious banter—there’s never a dull moment!

💬 Your choices matter – Shape Adam’s fate and build your relationships with unique dialogues and narrative paths.

🌍 An expanded world – Explore not just Silverleaf University, but also Silverwood, a town full of secrets and dangers.

🎶 Immersive soundtrack – Music and sound effects that enhance the atmosphere, from thrilling action to the most intimate moments.

🎨 Breathtaking visuals – Detailed illustrations, fluid animations, and an art style that brings characters and locations to life.

If you love the world of Monster College or you’re looking for an adult visual novel filled with monsters, romance, and plenty of humor, Monster City is the game for you!

data.short_description: Set in the same universe as Monster College, this spin-off features a young vampire struggling with family problems, curses and atypical powers. Join him as he attends college and meets sexy new girls, each with their own peculiarities.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later
  • 處理器: Intel based or M1 under Rosetta
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • Storage: 6 GB available space

  • Processor: Intel based or M1 under Rosetta
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
